hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented Travel Rule provider outputs into structured workflows that preserve evidence, enable case management, and support regulatory rule monitoring for digital asset compliance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions

problem_title: Compliance slows when Travel Rule checks disconnect
problem_description: Travel Rule messages and exception data often exist outside core compliance workflows, creating gaps in case management and audit evidence. This fragmentation forces manual reconciliation, slows reviews, and weakens the traceability and defensibility of compliance decisions for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates Travel Rule messages, exception handling, case creation, decision logs and audit evidence into one connected compliance workflow for VASP operations teams to reduce manual effort and improve review traceability.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule checks to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY links Travel Rule message routing, exception handling and provider checks into cases with preserved evidence and structured compliance review workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, enabling VASPs to connect KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, case management, and reporting for clearer compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle disconnected Travel Rule checks?
faq_2_answer: SFTY overlays fragmented Travel Rule checks by routing message data, handling exceptions, opening cases, and linking compliance actions into one controlled workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, and supporting evidence for Travel Rule events to support an auditable compliance record.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY works alongside existing Travel Rule providers, aggregating their outputs into a single review and evidence platform without disrupting current integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured cases, reviews, rule updates, evidence and reporting workflows.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule checks into structured workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule provider outputs into cases, evidence packages, compliance decisions and audit-ready records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
